_metadata.title: Phase 16 Evidence Data File Index
_metadata.purpose: Master index of all structured evidence files generated during Phase 16

evidence_files.description: Citadel Securities LLC FY2020-2023 balance sheets (audited X-17A-5)
Palafox Trading LLC FY2021-2023 (G1/GFIL clearing entity)
OCC vs NSCC initial margin comparison Q1-Q2 2024
State Street triple-role nexus (XRT lending + OCC custodian + SSNYP)
evidence_files.key_finding: $35.2B tape-reconstructed TRS matches $35.17B audited SSNYP (0.08% error)

evidence_files.description: CSIN and CSSD FY2024 balance sheets
evidence_files.key_finding: Both subsidiaries confirm Miami FL address, CSSD has $3.4B assets
$450M+ annual tax savings, unlimited homestead, TBE for all personalty

evidence_files.description: FY2024 public financial data (from reporting, not direct extraction)
evidence_files.key_finding: Record $9.7B revenue, $4.2B net income, $80.4B total assets

evidence_files.description: Line-by-line keyword extraction from all entity PDFs
evidence_files.key_finding: Raw evidence of every parsed line with page numbers

evidence_files.description: Text/scan analysis for all 22 archived PDFs
AETOS Capital Group N-CSR keyword analysis
evidence_files.key_finding: Margin call references are standard risk disclosure language

evidence_files.description: N-CSR XRT securities lending agent identification
evidence_files.key_finding: State Street Bank = lending agent for XRT shares

evidence_files.description: Interactive Brokers Rule 606 venue routing data
evidence_files.key_finding: IB LITE routes to Citadel/Jane Street as primary venues
